records.name: binary_completion
records.label: Binary
records.description: Baseline current semantics: an edge survives iff every member is complete.

records.name: additive_partial_activation
records.label: Additive
records.description: Non-singleton edges can activate from summed partial progress.

records.name: capped_additive_activation
records.label: Capped
records.description: Partial progress contributes, but local credit is capped before readout.

records.name: heterogeneous_variable_weights
records.label: Weights
records.description: Variables contribute with fixed heterogeneous weights.

records.name: heterogeneous_family_thresholds
records.label: Family Priority
records.description: One lexicographically favored family edge activates earlier than the rest.

records.name: order_sensitive_completion
records.label: Order
records.description: Non-singleton edges survive only when local progress rises in edge order.

records.name: multilevel_local_progress
records.label: Multilevel
records.description: Edges read three local progress levels instead of a binary completed/not-completed flag.

records.name: overlap_bonus
records.label: Bonus
records.description: Overlap can rescue a present but not-yet-complete edge.

records.name: overlap_exclusion
records.label: Exclusion
records.description: Overlap can suppress an otherwise complete edge.
